title: get pipeline execution status
description: Verify that GET /api/status returns the current execution state of the pipeline with a 200 status code and correct state information such as idle or running.

title: run pipeline successfully
description: Test that POST /api/run executes the full EGX pipeline synchronously and returns a 200 status with success true and the pipeline stdout after successful completion.

title: handle pipeline run failure
description: Ensure that POST /api/run returns a 500 status with success false and an appropriate error message when the pipeline fails or an engine exits with a non-zero code.

title: prevent concurrent pipeline runs
description: Verify that POST /api/run returns a 500 status with success false and an error indicating concurrent execution is blocked when a lock file shows an active pipeline execution.

title: retrieve results after successful run
description: Confirm that after a successful POST /api/run, GET /api/results returns a 200 status with success true and an array of final time intelligence records.

title: handle results retrieval before run
description: Check that GET /api/results returns a 404 status with an error message indicating results are unavailable if no successful pipeline execution has occurred yet.
